bandit_raider.desc: A hard-looking tower raider in pieced mail, built to break a line and hold the breach.

taunt.text: The bandit raider spits to the side and tightens his grip on the spear.

emote_reactions.default: The bandit raider narrows his eyes and keeps watching the line.

bandit_raider.name: Bandit Raider

bandit_scout.desc: A lean ridge-runner with a short blade, quick eyes, and no love for fair odds.
bandit_scout.name: Bandit Scout

barrow_wisp.desc: A grave-light drifting above the stones, beautiful right up until it starts hating you.
barrow_wisp.name: Barrow Wisp

bog_creeper.desc: A root-thick marsh horror pulling itself through the reeds with mud, vine, and old water bound into one bad decision.
bog_creeper.name: Bog Creeper

briar_imp.desc: A thorn-limbed little horror with ember eyes and a voice like twigs snapping.
briar_imp.name: Briar Imp

captain_varn_blackreed.desc: A disciplined bandit captain in a rain-dark coat, moving like he expects every fight to become his line if he wants it badly enough.
captain_varn_blackreed.name: Captain Varn Blackreed

carrion_hound.desc: A kennel-starved hound bred lean, mean, and far too used to the smell of the dead.
carrion_hound.name: Carrion Hound

cave_bat_swarm.desc: A screaming knot of cave bats that has learned the taste of cook smoke, bad meat, and exposed faces.
cave_bat_swarm.name: Cave Bat Swarm

cave_spider.desc: A thick-legged spider that has grown too comfortable in the roots and stones.
cave_spider.name: Cave Spider

drowned_warder.desc: A drowned lock-keeper shape in old oilskins and iron braces, still carrying out a duty the marsh should have taken from it years ago.
drowned_warder.name: Drowned Warder

fen_wisp.desc: A pale bog-light drifting just above the waterline, bright enough to follow and wrong enough to regret it immediately.
fen_wisp.name: Fen Wisp

foreman_coilback.desc: A salvage overseer welded into a crane-rig harness, all piston limbs and command lights gone hostile.
foreman_coilback.name: Foreman Coilback

forest_wolf.desc: A heavier woodland wolf with burrs in its coat and an unsettling calm.
forest_wolf.name: Forest Wolf

goblin_brute.desc: A thick-necked tunnel bully dragging chain, iron, and enough bad temper to make the cave itself feel narrower.
goblin_brute.name: Goblin Brute

goblin_cutter.desc: A thicker-set goblin raider gripping a nicked blade and stolen work gear.
goblin_cutter.name: Goblin Cutter

goblin_hexer.desc: A soot-daubed goblin muttering over bone charms and filthy thread, all hungry grin and mean little rituals.
goblin_hexer.name: Goblin Hexer

goblin_slinger.desc: A goblin skirmisher with a leather sling and a pouch full of stolen stones.
goblin_slinger.name: Goblin Slinger

goblin_sneak.desc: A wiry goblin with quick hands and ugly road-cutting habits.
goblin_sneak.name: Goblin Sneak

grave_crow.desc: A black carrion bird with pale eye-fire and a beak too eager for the living.
grave_crow.name: Grave Crow

grubnak_the_pot_king.desc: An oversized goblin tyrant wearing a battered pot lid like a crown and carrying a black iron ladle like a scepter.
grubnak_the_pot_king.name: Grubnak the Pot-King

hollow_lantern.desc: A drowned lamp-spirit gathered around an old civic light, all blackwater reflection, white fire, and the certainty that duty outlived mercy.
hollow_lantern.name: The Hollow Lantern

hollow_wisp.desc: A white drowned lamp-glow drifting just above the black water, bright enough to follow and empty enough to regret.
hollow_wisp.name: Hollow Wisp

mag_clamp_drone.desc: A hovering clamp rig that locks, drags, and tags targets with ugly machine patience.
mag_clamp_drone.name: Mag-Clamp Drone

mire_hound.desc: A marsh-bred hound with reed-matted hide, yellow eyes, and the sort of patience wet country teaches predators.
mire_hound.name: Mire Hound

miretooth.desc: A fen-born apex predator with a scarred muzzle, reed-dark hide, and a gait that makes the marsh itself look like it is stalking with him.
miretooth.name: Miretooth

mossling.desc: A squat knot of wet bark and roots that moves with patient, herbal malice.
mossling.name: Mossling

old_greymaw.desc: A scarred apex wolf with old iron snapped off in one shoulder and too much cunning in its eyes.
old_greymaw.name: Old Greymaw

relay_tick.desc: A darting relay parasite throwing needle-bright pulses through the scrap fog.
relay_tick.name: Relay Tick

restless_shade.desc: A dim human outline full of grief, bad memory, and enough spite to stay dangerous.
restless_shade.name: Restless Shade

road_wolf.desc: A lean wolf made bold by hunger and too many easy roads.
road_wolf.name: Road Wolf

rot_crow.desc: A long-winged marsh crow with bone-white eyes and a talent for circling anything about to stop moving.
rot_crow.name: Rot Crow

ruk_fence_cutter.desc: A broad goblin brute in stolen harness, gripping the jagged axe that gave him his name.
ruk_fence_cutter.name: Ruk the Fence-Cutter

salvage_drone.desc: A hovering work drone whose tool arms now serve nobody gentle.
salvage_drone.name: Salvage Drone

scrap_hound.desc: A four-legged salvage brute stitched from plates, clamps, and bad civic planning.
scrap_hound.name: Scrap Hound

scrap_mite.desc: A palm-sized salvage machine skittering on too many magnetic feet.
scrap_mite.name: Scrap Mite

silt_stalker.desc: A long-limbed marsh hunter slipping through the flooded stonework on claws and bad patience.
silt_stalker.name: Silt Stalker

sir_edric_restless.desc: A long-dead knight risen in dim mail and torn surcoat, still carrying command like a wound that never closed.
sir_edric_restless.name: Sir Edric the Restless

skeletal_soldier.desc: An old soldier's bones held together by stubborn malice and older oaths.
skeletal_soldier.name: Skeletal Soldier

sludge_slime.desc: A crawl of grease-thick cave sludge pulling itself along with bits of bone, ash, and goblin kitchen ruin half dissolved inside it.
sludge_slime.name: Sludge Slime

thorn_rat.desc: A large roadside rat with burrs and thorns snarled into its hide.
thorn_rat.name: Thorn Rat

tutorial_thorn_rat.desc: A burr-matted yard rat penned for training, still mean enough to make a lesson stick.
tutorial_thorn_rat.name: Yard Thorn Rat

tower_archer.desc: A ridge archer with a tower bow, a cold eye, and a bad habit of aiming where the mail parts.
tower_archer.name: Tower Archer

blackfen_approach_boglight_hollow.intro: Bog-light gathers in the hollow just long enough to show you how many bad shapes were waiting in it.
blackfen_approach_boglight_hollow.title: Hollow Lights

blackfen_approach_boglight_hollow.intro: A creeper churns up through the black water while a wisp hangs back, bright and hateful over the pool.
blackfen_approach_boglight_hollow.title: Root and Glass

blackfen_approach_boglight_hollow.intro: Rot crows break from the dead trees just as marsh light starts drifting around your ankles.
blackfen_approach_boglight_hollow.title: Hollow Carrion

blackfen_approach_carrion_rise.intro: The high mudbank gives just enough footing for the local killers to enjoy the angle.
blackfen_approach_carrion_rise.title: Rise Watch

blackfen_approach_carrion_rise.intro: A creeper heaves out of the mud shelf while crows start cutting low over the rise like they want the first claim.
blackfen_approach_carrion_rise.title: Rise Blight

blackfen_approach_carrion_rise.intro: The rise goes cold, then bright, then violent: marsh light ahead, teeth below, wings behind.
blackfen_approach_carrion_rise.title: Bad Tide

blackfen_approach_fenreach_track.intro: The reeds part low and fast. Whatever owns this trail has already decided you count as movement first and people second.
blackfen_approach_fenreach_track.title: Reed Hunt

blackfen_approach_fenreach_track.intro: Mud shifts underfoot as a root mass heaves up through the water while bad fen-light starts drifting in from the side.
blackfen_approach_fenreach_track.title: Bog Pull

blackfen_approach_fenreach_track.intro: A marsh hound ranges the track while a second shape circles overhead, already measuring what part of you it wants later.
blackfen_approach_fenreach_track.title: Wet Line

blackfen_approach_miretooths_wallow.intro: At the far black pool, Miretooth rises out of the reeds in one smooth hateful line, as if the whole fen has simply decided on a shape.
blackfen_approach_miretooths_wallow.title: Miretooth

blackfen_approach_reedflats.intro: The flats come alive all at once: one hound low through the reeds while a creeper drags itself out of the standing water behind it.
blackfen_approach_reedflats.title: Reed Press

blackfen_approach_reedflats.intro: A fen-light glides ahead like a promise and the marsh punishes you for noticing it.
blackfen_approach_reedflats.title: False Lanterns

blackfen_approach_reedflats.intro: A creeper blocks the path while rot crows rake across the top of the reeds looking for weakness.
blackfen_approach_reedflats.title: Marsh Line

brambleford_rat_and_kettle_cellar.intro: Barrels rattle, sacks split, and a pair of thorn rats come boiling out of the dark.
brambleford_rat_and_kettle_cellar.title: Cellar Scuttle

brambleford_rat_and_kettle_cellar.intro: Three cellar rats burst from behind the feed sacks like they own the place.
brambleford_rat_and_kettle_cellar.title: Grain Raiders

drowned_weir_blackwater_lamp_house.intro: At the drowned lamp house, the south light folds inward and stands up in the shape that has been wearing it all along.
drowned_weir_blackwater_lamp_house.title: The Hollow Lantern

drowned_weir_drowned_causeway.intro: Black water slaps the stone line and something old answers from the drowned causeway with the confidence of a post that never got relieved.
drowned_weir_drowned_causeway.title: Floodline Watch

drowned_weir_drowned_causeway.intro: The dead lamp posts along the causeway light up one by one, and the things under them start moving as if the signal finally reached them.
drowned_weir_drowned_causeway.title: Wrong Lanterns

drowned_weir_drowned_causeway.intro: Silt boils up at the stone edge while a pale marsh light drifts in behind it, already looking for the weakest footing in the party.
drowned_weir_drowned_causeway.title: Blackwater Pull

drowned_weir_lantern_weir.intro: Old spillway iron starts glowing in sick pulses and the drowned warders beneath it take that as permission rather than warning.
drowned_weir_lantern_weir.title: Weir Hold

drowned_weir_lantern_weir.intro: Light gathers over the drowned iron ribs just long enough to show you what was waiting in the channels underneath.
drowned_weir_lantern_weir.title: Spillway Lights

drowned_weir_lantern_weir.intro: One blackwater keeper steps into the path while something quicker circles the flooded stone just out of clean sight.
drowned_weir_lantern_weir.title: Keeper Line

drowned_weir_sluice_walk.intro: The raised walk turns mean all at once: old warders below, a pale light above, and no room for brave footwork in between.
drowned_weir_sluice_walk.title: Sluice Press

drowned_weir_sluice_walk.intro: Something fast claws across the iron grating while the drowned light overhead starts leaning toward you like it knows what comes next.
drowned_weir_sluice_walk.title: Grating Hunt

drowned_weir_sluice_walk.intro: The upper walk belongs to the wrong line now, and it has enough bodies left to enforce that opinion.
drowned_weir_sluice_walk.title: High Walk Claim

drowned_weir_sunken_lock.intro: The drowned lock wakes like a held breath finally deciding it has company, and the things guarding it rise with the chain noise.
drowned_weir_sunken_lock.title: Lock Blackwater

drowned_weir_sunken_lock.intro: A stalker slips through the chained gates while the warders behind it hold the chamber like they expect the town to apologize for coming back.
drowned_weir_sunken_lock.title: Chain Line

drowned_weir_sunken_lock.intro: Black water heaves in the chamber and the whole lock answers at once: iron, claws, and that same white drowned light that does not know how to stop.
drowned_weir_sunken_lock.title: Lock Surge

goblin_road_fencebreaker_camp.intro: A heavy goblin rises from behind the chopped rails, lantern glass grit crunching under one boot as he drags a jagged axe through the dirt.
goblin_road_fencebreaker_camp.title: Ruk the Fence-Cutter

goblin_road_old_fence_line.intro: Two goblins are still at the fence line, hacking loose boards and stacking them like someone is waiting for the next load.
goblin_road_old_fence_line.title: Fencebreakers

goblin_road_old_fence_line.intro: A goblin raider jerks a cut harness from the mud just as a hungry wolf slips out beside him, both of them too comfortable on Brambleford's road.
goblin_road_old_fence_line.title: Mud and Teeth

goblin_road_old_fence_line.intro: A goblin slinger peppers the road with stolen stones while a cutter rushes in behind him, blade still nicked with fence sap.
goblin_road_old_fence_line.title: Stone and Knife

goblin_road_trailhead.intro: A road wolf slips from the brush with cart mud on its legs and tests your nerve.
goblin_road_trailhead.title: A Roadside Wolf

goblin_road_trailhead.intro: A pair of thorn rats spill out from a ditch near torn canvas, all teeth and burr-matted fur.
goblin_road_trailhead.title: Thorn Rat Scatter

goblin_road_trailhead.intro: A goblin darts out from a ditch, knife-first and badly overconfident.
goblin_road_trailhead.title: Goblin Harrier

goblin_road_wolf_turn.intro: Shapes move in the bend ahead. The wolves are no longer pretending to fear the road.
goblin_road_wolf_turn.title: Wolf Turn Pack

goblin_road_wolf_turn.intro: A goblin pair lunges out as you round the bend, one high and one low.
goblin_road_wolf_turn.title: Turn Ambush

goblin_warrens_bone_midden.intro: The bone heap collapses in a flutter of wings and filthy laughter as the midden defenders throw themselves at you.
goblin_warrens_bone_midden.title: Midden Raze

goblin_warrens_bone_midden.intro: Chain drags across cracked bone as two goblin brutes stomp up through the midden with room-rattling confidence.
goblin_warrens_bone_midden.title: Brute Heap

goblin_warrens_bone_midden.intro: A slime oozes through the midden while a hexer works a curse line behind it and bats begin to wake overhead.
goblin_warrens_bone_midden.title: Sour Heap

goblin_warrens_feast_hall.intro: The feast hall erupts in noise. One brute shoves forward, a hexer starts chanting, and the ceiling seems far too interested in joining.
goblin_warrens_feast_hall.title: Hall Carvers

goblin_warrens_feast_hall.intro: Hot stink, slick stone, and a goblin line that thinks it owns the floor. It would prefer not to share.
goblin_warrens_feast_hall.title: Grease Line

goblin_warrens_feast_hall.intro: The warrens answer all at once: chain, curses, wings, and enough tunnel confidence to make the hall itself feel mean.
goblin_warrens_feast_hall.title: Hall Press

goblin_warrens_pot_kings_court.intro: At the far court, Grubnak lurches up from his iron seat, pot lid crown ringing as he slams his ladle across the stones and calls the whole hall to supper.
goblin_warrens_pot_kings_court.title: Grubnak the Pot-King

goblin_warrens_sinkmouth_cut.intro: Torchlight jerks through the cut and a pair of goblin tunnel guards rush to keep the surface where it belongs: above them.
goblin_warrens_sinkmouth_cut.title: Sinkmouth Watch

goblin_warrens_sinkmouth_cut.intro: Something shrieks from the ceiling just as tunnel brutes come grinding up through the soot and mud.
goblin_warrens_sinkmouth_cut.title: Batdrop Cut

goblin_warrens_sinkmouth_cut.intro: A sludge shape peels off the wall while a hexer starts spitting curses from behind it.
goblin_warrens_sinkmouth_cut.title: Filth Watch

goblin_warrens_sludge_run.intro: The channel slurps, shifts, and suddenly develops teeth in more places than a channel should.
goblin_warrens_sludge_run.title: Runoff Pull

goblin_warrens_sludge_run.intro: The runoff stirs underfoot just as cave bats dive low through the steam and greasy torch smoke.
goblin_warrens_sludge_run.title: Slop Bats

goblin_warrens_sludge_run.intro: A hexer holds the far bank while the sludge between you answers to every ugly word it knows.
goblin_warrens_sludge_run.title: Run Hex

goblin_warrens_torchgut_tunnel.intro: The tunnel narrows at exactly the wrong moment and the goblins on the far side mean to keep it that way.
goblin_warrens_torchgut_tunnel.title: Torchgut Press

goblin_warrens_torchgut_tunnel.intro: A hexer spits soot over the torchline while cave bats tear loose from the black stone above it.
goblin_warrens_torchgut_tunnel.title: Hex and Fang

goblin_warrens_torchgut_tunnel.intro: A tunnel brute drives forward while something wet and hungry slides around the torchbend behind it.
goblin_warrens_torchgut_tunnel.title: Slime Turn

junkyard_planet_anchor_pit.intro: A crane-rig giant unfolds from the pit gantry, lights flaring across its welded spine as the whole yard answers to it.
junkyard_planet_anchor_pit.title: Foreman Coilback

junkyard_planet_crane_grave.intro: Dead crane arms creak overhead as a hound and salvage drone break from cover together.
junkyard_planet_crane_grave.title: Craneward Pair

junkyard_planet_crane_grave.intro: Two clamp rigs sweep through the yard, trying to pin anything that still moves like a person.
junkyard_planet_crane_grave.title: Clamp Line

junkyard_planet_crane_grave.intro: The crane grave wakes all at once: a relay tick darts between broken cabs while heavier machines advance behind it.
junkyard_planet_crane_grave.title: Grave Static

junkyard_planet_relay_trench.intro: Signal ticks pour from a trench conduit in a burst of white static and angry light.
junkyard_planet_relay_trench.title: Relay Swarm

junkyard_planet_relay_trench.intro: A clamp drone rises over the trench just as a relay tick starts painting targets below.
junkyard_planet_relay_trench.title: Trench Hold

junkyard_planet_relay_trench.intro: A scrap hound prowls the trench lip while a drone tracks movement from above.
junkyard_planet_relay_trench.title: Yard Watch

junkyard_planet_scrapway.intro: The scrap drift splits open and a cluster of skittering machine mites comes alive around you.
junkyard_planet_scrapway.title: Sparking Nest

junkyard_planet_scrapway.intro: A salvage drone rises from the metal haze, tool arms rotating into something much less civic.
junkyard_planet_scrapway.title: Drone Sweep

junkyard_planet_scrapway.intro: A drone hums awake overhead just as scrap mites surge through the wire drifts below.
junkyard_planet_scrapway.title: Broken Line

junkyard_planet_scrapway.intro: A plate-plated hound lopes through the salvage smoke while smaller machines wake around its paws.
junkyard_planet_scrapway.title: Hound and Haze

old_barrow_field_barrow_circle.intro: At the center stones, old burial lights gather around whatever still remembers being posted here.
old_barrow_field_barrow_circle.title: Circle Guard

old_barrow_field_barrow_circle.intro: A hush falls over the circle before shades and dead lights roll toward you from three sides.
old_barrow_field_barrow_circle.title: Mourners' Knot

old_barrow_field_causeway.intro: Something clatters under the old stones and a skeletal soldier hauls itself upright in the lantern gloom.
old_barrow_field_causeway.title: Causeway Rattle

old_barrow_field_causeway.intro: A grave crow dives from a marker post just as bones start knocking together in the ditch below.
old_barrow_field_causeway.title: Crow Pass

old_barrow_field_marker_row.intro: A restless shade unthreads itself from the marker row while a crow wheels low over your shoulder.
old_barrow_field_marker_row.title: Shade Between Stones

old_barrow_field_marker_row.intro: The line of old markers wakes all at once: bone, black wings, and a low pale light in the grass.
old_barrow_field_marker_row.title: Old Watch

old_barrow_field_sunken_dais.intro: Armor shifts on the sunken dais. A dead knight lifts his head, draws a ruined blade, and remembers command.
old_barrow_field_sunken_dais.title: Sir Edric the Restless

ruined_watchtower_approach.intro: Shapes move between the broken stones above the road. Bandits have already measured this approach and decided they like the angle.
ruined_watchtower_approach.title: Ridge Shadows

ruined_watchtower_approach.intro: A kennel hound tears down the slope while a scout cuts in behind it with a knife already out.
ruined_watchtower_approach.title: Hound Run

ruined_watchtower_approach.intro: A raider and lookout break from the shattered watchfire line and try to catch you in the narrow ground below.
ruined_watchtower_approach.title: Watchfire Raiders

ruined_watchtower_archers_ledge.intro: Boot scrape above, bowstring below. The ledge is already occupied and none of them are in a sharing mood.
ruined_watchtower_archers_ledge.title: Ledge Line

ruined_watchtower_archers_ledge.intro: A scout darts low across the ledge while an archer works the height behind him.
ruined_watchtower_archers_ledge.title: Spotter Pair

ruined_watchtower_archers_ledge.intro: A hound comes off the chain just as a bowstring snaps tight from the rocks above.
ruined_watchtower_archers_ledge.title: Kennel Ledge

ruined_watchtower_blackreed_roost.intro: At the broken tower crown, Captain Varn Blackreed turns from the parapet and draws steel like he has already counted where each of you will fall.
ruined_watchtower_blackreed_roost.title: Captain Varn Blackreed

ruined_watchtower_breach_yard.intro: Bandits pour through the broken outer yard, one holding the front while the other probes for an opening.
ruined_watchtower_breach_yard.title: Breach Yard Press

ruined_watchtower_breach_yard.intro: An archer takes the line from broken stone while a hound ranges below, trying to flush you into the shot.
ruined_watchtower_breach_yard.title: Arrow And Hide

ruined_watchtower_breach_yard.intro: The yard wakes all at once: a tower archer barks a range, then raiders close from either side of the breach.
ruined_watchtower_breach_yard.title: Broken Muster

ruined_watchtower_cracked_stairs.intro: Raiders hammer down the cracked stairs while an archer leans over the turn to rake the climb.
ruined_watchtower_cracked_stairs.title: Stairs Hold

ruined_watchtower_cracked_stairs.intro: Two hard cases block the stair curve with enough steel and bad intent to make the climb expensive.
ruined_watchtower_cracked_stairs.title: Broken Shieldwall

ruined_watchtower_cracked_stairs.intro: A hound hits first, then the raider behind it tries to use the chaos of the stairs as cover.
ruined_watchtower_cracked_stairs.title: Upper Kennel

tutorial_vermin_pens.intro: Straw erupts under the rail and a thorn rat bolts straight at the nearest warm ankle.
tutorial_vermin_pens.title: Yard Scuttle

tutorial_vermin_pens.intro: A burr-matted rat launches itself out of a feed bin with all the confidence of a creature that has never once paid for grain.
tutorial_vermin_pens.title: Bin Raider

whispering_woods_briar_glade.intro: The briars stir. One imp laughs, and the moss beneath it rises into a shape with claws.
whispering_woods_briar_glade.title: Glade Guardians

whispering_woods_briar_glade.intro: The glade goes quiet except for a low growl somewhere nearby and the crackle of thorn-fire.
whispering_woods_briar_glade.title: Grey Trail

whispering_woods_briar_glade.intro: Root webs and pale silk overlap here, watched by patient things that know this ground.
whispering_woods_briar_glade.title: Snare Roots

whispering_woods_greymaw_hollow.intro: A massive scarred wolf rises from the hollow, vanishes into the brush, and begins to circle.
whispering_woods_greymaw_hollow.title: Old Greymaw

whispering_woods_old_stone_path.intro: Fresh webbing hangs between the leaning stones, and the spiders behind it are not shy.
whispering_woods_old_stone_path.title: Stone Path Web

whispering_woods_old_stone_path.intro: A briar imp capers between the stones while a mossling anchors the glade with wet roots.
whispering_woods_old_stone_path.title: Whispering Hex

whispering_woods_old_stone_path.intro: A forest wolf darts across the path just as a spider drops behind you.
whispering_woods_old_stone_path.title: Rootside Pounce

whispering_woods_trailhead.intro: A forest wolf slips between the trunks and comes in low, testing your line.
whispering_woods_trailhead.title: Silent Prowler

whispering_woods_trailhead.intro: A cave spider descends from the roots while a mossling stirs awake in the damp brush.
whispering_woods_trailhead.title: Web and Rot

whispering_woods_trailhead.intro: A briar imp crackles somewhere ahead while a forest wolf circles to cut off retreat.
whispering_woods_trailhead.title: Embers in the Brush

encounter.title: Blackreed Patrol
encounter.intro: A Blackreed patrol works the broken road in a loose line, searching for stragglers and bad luck.

encounter.title: Warren Mob
encounter.intro: A goblin mob rattles through the tunnels in a hard, hungry knot of teeth and stolen metal.

encounter.title: Fen Hunt
encounter.intro: A marsh hunt slips through the reeds with the patience of something that already knows the mud by name.

encounter.title: Weir Patrol
encounter.intro: Drowned warders drift between the crossings, checking every shadow for something that should not be there.

encounter.title: Road Raiders
encounter.intro: A pair of goblin raiders keeps to the fence line and ditch cuts, looking for easy travelers and loose planks.

encounter.title: Road Wolf Pack
encounter.intro: Lean road wolves work the muddy bends in a restless pack, testing anything that looks slower than hunger.

encounter.title: Barrow Watch
encounter.intro: Old field guardians drift between the markers and causeway, answering every step with bone and pale fire.

encounter.title: Barrow Mourners
encounter.intro: Shades and grave crows wheel through the field in a knot of old grief that refuses to stay buried.

encounter.title: Thornbound Pair
encounter.intro: A briar imp capers through the brush while a mossling drags the roots along behind it like a leash.

encounter.title: Whispering Hunters
encounter.intro: A forest wolf and a patient spider move the old stone path like they have hunted it together for years.
